title: Pitești, Argeș — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pitești, Argeș: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pitești is a city in Argeș with a population of 155,383. A major industrial center in southern Romania, known for its automotive industry (Dacia/Renault), the nearby Curtea de Argeș Monastery, and the Trivale Park.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
